text: I am in a space that hums with the anticipation of discovery. Glass walls and violet lights envelop me with a faint sense of otherworldliness—futuristic yet inviting. As I approach the R+D exhibit, I feel my curiosity being drawn ever forward, eager to understand how humanity molds and is molded by technology. Yet, a certain solemnity lingers, too, as I contemplate my smallness amongst so many grand ideas. I feel thoughtful, humbled, and quietly exhilarated to witness human ingenuity on display.
